name: Mashin Sentai Kiramager
original_name: 魔進戦隊キラメイジャー
overview: After the kingdom of Crystalia is plunged into a deep darkness by Yodonheim, the army of darkness. Princess Mabushina, comes to Earth with the Kiramai Stones to find individuals with strong "shining spirits" to become the Kiramagers and fight against the Yodonheim Army.

trailers.title: Mashin Sentai Kirameiger- Episode 1 PREVIEW (English Subs)
